titleStmt.title: SII 23.90: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 90. (A.R. No. 90 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the south wall of the central shrine Māṟavarman Vikrama-Pāṇḍya: year 7+4

summary.p: This inscription begins with the historical introduction Tirumagaḷ Jayamagaḷ etc. The initial date of the king has been surmised to be A.D. 1269-70 in the Annual Report for 1917, Part II, para 10. It will be seen however from Nos. 91 and 97 below that this Vikrama-Pāṇḍya has to be placed about a century earlier, and that he was very likely the predecessor of Jaṭāvarman Kulaśēkhara who ascended the throne in A.D. 1190. He is referred to in No. 83 of 1927 a record of the latter from Tirunelveli as Periya-Nāyanār.

The present epigraph registers a sale by the Mahā-sabhā of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, of 6(1/2) mā of land at Maṟappaṟṟu Elivāram to the temple of Nilaiyuḍaiya-Pāṇḍiya-Īśvarmuḍaiyār at Kallaḍaikkuṟichchi. The price of the land seems to have been fixed at 13 kāśu, to be paid to the assembly on behalf of the temple by one Vīṟṟirundāṉ Pūvandaṉ of Koṭṭaiyūr. The reason for this is stated to be that the land did not get the benefit of the first (head) flow of the irrigation water, while that advantage probably went to the individual mentioned. Reference is made to the exclusion from this transaction, of a land measuring 3 vēli which had been gifted to the temple of Grāmarāja-Viṇṇagar-Emberumāṇ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷ ceyamakaḷ tiruppuyat tiruppa porukaṭalāṭai nila makaḷ puṇara kaṭavuḷ meruvil kayal viḷaiyāṭa vaṭapulamaṉṉavar vantaṭi paṇiya
ṉemivaraicūḷ neṭunila muḻuvatum tarmaveṇkuṭai ṉiḻal taḻaippa ceṅ kol naṭappa karuṅkali turantu vetavitiyil ṉitinilavac ceraṉu vaḷavaṉun tiṟai kuṇantiṟaiñca viramum pukaḻu mika naṉi viḷa
ṅka natipperuñcaṭaimuṭinātaṉ cūṭiya matikkulan tikaḷ maṇimuṭi cūṭi viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi viraciṅkācaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya ko māṟapaṉma rāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvikkiramapāṇṭiyatevaṟkiyā
ṇṭu Eḻāvatiṉ Etir nālāmāṇṭu simhanāyiṟṟu muḷḷināṭṭu pirama teyam śrī rājarājacaturvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūr teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicciyil nilaiyuṭaiya pāṇṭiya Ī
ccuramuṭaiyāṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu teṉpiṭākai maṟappaṟṟil Elivārattil Ivar paḻampaṟṟil nilattukku cer paḻampaṟṟu Ellai yāvatu kiḻellai paṭṭaṇacuvāmi Uḻutuvarukiṟa nilattil teṉvaṭal peruvarampuk
ku meṟkum teṉellai cāttanūr peruṅkālukku vaṭakkum melellai Iḷaṅkāvaikku nirpāykiṟa vāyttalai paḻaṅkālukku kiḻakku vaṭa Ellai Ikkālukku teṟkum Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa paḻa
m paṟṟu Uvapacu-m muṉpu kirāma rājaviṇṇakar Emperumāṉukku tāṉap piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta nilam muveli nikki Innilam Aṟumā varaiyum meṉākkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟuk kuṭuttom
mahāsabhaiyom nilaiuṭaiya pāṇṭiya Īccuramuṭaiyāṟku Ipparicu viṟṟukkuṭutta Innilattukku sabhaiyār Aruḷicceyya Ippaṭi talai kaṭai nir viḻātatāl Accu 2 Āka tarappaṭiyāl vanta Accu 10 3 Ivvaccu pa
tiṉmuṉṟukkum vilaipporuṭ celavarattu maṟappaṟṟu kuṟappaṟṟu kārāṇmai kaiykkoḷḷa kaṟpūravilaikku Eṉṟa Accu tiruvāyk keḻviyum Uḷvariyum koṭuvantavarkaḷ kuṭiviṭai niṉṟa cituṅkap pallavaraiyar
Aṭaippil Āyiravaṟkum karumāṇikkappallavaraiya raṭaippil Āyiravaṟku vākaiyaṟai nāyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārvacam niyokappaṭi koṭṭaiyūr viṟṟiruntāṉ pūvantaṉ taraviṉpaṭi Ivvaccu patiṉmuṉṟum kuṭu
ppittu Innilattukku Ituve vilaiolaiyum poruḷ cilavolaiyum Āva tākavum Ituallatu veṟuvilaimāvaṟuti poruṭcilavolai kāṭṭa vum kāṇavum kaṭamaiyiṉṟi vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu
vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom śrīirājarājacaturvedi maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom nilaiuṭaipāṇṭiya Īccuramuṭaiyārkku Ippaṭik kivai koṭṭaiyūr viṟṟiruntāṉpūvantaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kivai
vaṅkippuṟattu ciṅkappirāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kivai tirupputtūr Aracu tirumalai comāci Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai tirukkaṭavūr śrīkṛṣṇan karu māṇikkattiṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai Emappeṟṟūr terpoliya niṉṟāṉ kaṇṇapaṭṭaṉ comāci Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkivai Iḷaṅkokkuṭi cuntarattoḻuṭaiyāṉ tirumayāṉatarmaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai parāntūr śrīkṛṣṇan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai puḷḷamaṅ kalattu Eccavarākaṉ Eccamuttiyiṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai tirunal lūr tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ
Uttiraciṉaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai tiruveḷḷaṟai civatevaṉ śrīkaiyi lāyamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai pāppārkuṟicci tāmotaraṉ Āḷkoṇṭavilli Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai kurovi cātavetaṉ makaṉ śrīmātavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivar
kaḷ paṇikka vilaippiramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ koṭṭaiyūr viṟṟiruntāṉ pūvantaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai koṟṟaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kivai pattaṅki Eccamutti Eḻuttu niṉṟatevaṉ tillai kuttaṉāṉa teṉnavaṉ Ācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
